name: @hfsp-labs/colosseum
description: HFSP Labs unified monorepo for Clawdrop MCP and Agent Provisioning

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/agent-provisioning && npm install && cd ../clawdrop-mcp && npm install
scripts.prepare: cd packages/clawdrop-mcp && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build

author: HFSP Labs
